scaffolding_seesaw.description: Player times jumps to launch GPC Supply crates to builders on roof

interior_sim.description: 2D side-on cross-section with platforming, NPCs, modules

keeper.character: Gene. Corporate Merlin. Purple suit, gold star tie, walking stick.

bulldozer.description: Dual-mode terrain deformation. Topo mode (control room) + stunt mode (exterior)

control_room.description: Basement (floor -1). Baby blue/white TNG palette. Agent's future home.

rgb.description: Reality Generation Box. Self-contained LLM-powered experience engine.
rgb.boundary: sacred — sim is handcrafted, RGB is alive, they don't contaminate

design_principles: The player's body is the tool — climb, jump, swing, drive, launch
Discovery over instruction — no tutorials, redesign instead
Character dignity — three-line reveals, nobody is disposable
Fixed identity over catalog — every block has a name and a consequence
Hunger as rhythm — mechanical need becomes narrative gateway
BYOK as culmination — earn the right to bring your mind in
invariants: S object structure — everything reads it
Seeded RNG sequence — changing order changes every world
Camera save/restore nesting — parallax depends on it

gene.narrative_rule: Early lines must be forgettable first, devastating in hindsight
